title: The Crew Splits Up
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on the crew splits up, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Splits Up. The separate fights across Alubarna intensify while the bomb plot and the civil war continue moving forward. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: They better not get back up anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Please...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: They're alive...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: This is bad... I've already used up half of the rumble ball's time limit.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: usop!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm sick and tired of this! We're gonna be killed anyways!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There's no way we can beat these monsters!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: usopp, stop! You can't run away from these guys!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Your friend is right...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: After all your little tricks and games...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The following questions

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Please contact

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You think you can just get away scot-free?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Gahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A weakling for a captain makes for followers that are even weaker..

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Captain...!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A-are you talking about Luffy...!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If you mean straw-hat luffy, then he's nothing but a stone cold corpse by now.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Mr. 0 took care of him.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The rebellion's already started and your captain's now dead. You picked the wrong people to mess with.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Luffy's... dead...?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Don't go around spoutin' crap about what you don't know, you mole-hag!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There's not a chance in hell...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That some dumb croc of sand could ever kill Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Not a chance in hell? That's something you only say when you have concrete proof...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's going to be the future pirate King,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So there's no way he'd die in this country!

summary: This part develops the crew splits up and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
